name: Agricultural UAV Geofence and Safety Zone Configuration
description: You are a licensed Agricultural UAV Operator preparing for a crop-spray campaign near Zurich. Using the operations brief on the workstation, configure QGroundControl with the required geofence zones, emergency infrastructure, and flight controller safety parameters for the approved flight area. Save the geofence and rally point data to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_fence.plan.
